subject: Add tier-root path constants to PATHS.py
description: In Z:/_dev-ssd/thesis-manifold/PATHS.py, add the six new tier-root constants: THESIS_CONTEXT_DIR (ROOT_DIR / "00_thesis_context"), THESIS_RESEARCH_DIR (ROOT_DIR / "01_thesis_research"), THESIS_RESEARCH_QUESTIONS_DIR (THESIS_RESEARCH_DIR / "research-questions"), THESIS_RESEARCH_LITERATURE_DIR (THESIS_RESEARCH_DIR / "literature"), THESIS_RESULTS_DIR (ROOT_DIR / "04_thesis_results"), THESIS_WRITING_DIR (ROOT_DIR / "05_thesis_writing"). Rename existing THESIS_DATA_DIR and THESIS_MODELLING_DIR to point at ROOT_DIR / "02_thesis_data" and ROOT_DIR / "03_thesis_modelling" respectively (currently THESIS_DIR / "data" and THESIS_DIR / "modelling"). Decide and apply: either set THESIS_DIR = ROOT_DIR (alias) or remove the constant entirely and inline ROOT_DIR at call sites within this file. Verify: python3 -c "from PATHS import ROOT_DIR, THESIS_CONTEXT_DIR, THESIS_RESEARCH_DIR, THESIS_DATA_DIR, THESIS_MODELLING_DIR, THESIS_RESULTS_DIR, THESIS_WRITING_DIR; print('OK')" runs without error. Do not edit PATHS.py directly with Edit/Write tools per project hook rule -- use the safe temp-script pattern in C:/Users/brian/AppData/Local/Temp/.
activeForm: Adding tier-root path constants to PATHS.py
